sql_array: CREATE TABLE test (v Variant(UInt64, String)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT variantType(v) AS type_name, v FROM test;
UPDATE test SET v = 'Updated Value' WHERE v = NULL;
SELECT toTypeName(v) AS type_name, variantElement(v, 'UInt64') AS uint64_value, variantElement(v, 'String') AS string_value FROM test;
